name: Stewed Tomatoes and Eggs Mondolfo Style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small frying pan, sauté onions in olive oil with salt and pepper until wilted and soft.
2. Add tomatoes and chopped parsley; cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring often, until the oil separates.
3. Gently break the 4 eggs (spaced) into the pan and let them poach until yolks reach your desired level of doneness.
4. Serve with plenty of crusty bread to soak up the tomato sauce and a salad for a great lunch for two.
